statusLegend.manual: Suite is fully owned and manually maintained in tests/src.
statusLegend.needs-migration: Module has either a promoted scaffold-derived suite or no authored suite yet and still needs manual semantic migration.
statusLegend.excluded: Module is intentionally out of scope because it is macro-only, internal plumbing, or target-specific support code.
